Why Body Works

A Local Salon That Gets It Right

We're not a big chain — we're your Tuscaloosa neighbors on Queen City Ave. Clean beds, quality Norvell solution, friendly staff, and prices that work on a student budget. Come see why we're a campus favorite.

Home › Services

Our Services

From a quick single bed session to professional Norvell airbrush tans — handled with care. Students save $2 with a valid ID.

UV Beds

UV Tanning

Our clean, well-maintained UV beds give you a fast, even base tan. Choose a single session or save with multi-visit packs and unlimited passes.

  • One Visit — $10
  • Five Visits — $35
  • Ten Visits — $50 (best value)
  • Month Unlimited — $35
  • One Week — $20 · Two Weeks — $30 (specials)
Visit Us
Airbrush

Norvell Spray Tans

Professional, custom airbrush tans using trusted Norvell solution — no UV required. Pick the formula and depth that fit your event and skin tone.

  • Norvell Original — $25 · develops 6–8 hrs
  • Norvell Plus (dark) — $30 · develops 6–8 hrs
  • Norvell One (express) — $35 · rinse 1–3 hrs
  • Face only — $10–$14
  • Half body — $20–$30
Visit Us
Extras

Teeth Whitening

Round out your glow-up with a quick, in-salon teeth whitening session.

  • Teeth Whitening — $35
  • $2 off any service with a student ID
  • Lotions, bronzers, drinks & Bama tees in our shop

Home › About

About Body Works

Locally owned, built on clean service, fair prices, and a whole lot of glow.

Our Story

Rooted in Tuscaloosa

Body Works Tanning Salon has been a Tuscaloosa go-to for over 25 years, right on Queen City Ave. Whether you're prepping for spring break, a game-day weekend, formal season, or just want to keep your glow through winter, we've got a service that fits your skin and your schedule.

We treat every guest the way we'd want to be treated — honest advice, clean equipment, and no pressure. It's why so many University of Alabama students make us part of their routine.

Come See Us

What we stand for

Our Core Values

✨

Clean & Sanitized

Beds and rooms cleaned between every guest, every time.

🤝

Honest Service

Straight pricing and the right recommendation for your skin.

🎓

Student-Friendly

$2 off services with a valid student ID — campus-approved.

⭐

Your Glow First

We're not happy until you walk out loving your tan.

Where we serve

Tuscaloosa & Nearby

Based at 513 Queen City Ave in Tuscaloosa, we welcome guests from all around the area and the University of Alabama campus.
